title: isoetes bolanderi var. pygmaea
intro: Isoetes bolanderi var. pygmaea, also known as Bolander's quillwort or pygmy quillwort, is a rare and small aquatic plant species belonging to the Isoetaceae family. Although limited research is available on its medicinal properties, Isoetes bolanderi var. pygmaea is believed to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. It may offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. However, due to its rarity and lack of extensive research, Isoetes bolanderi var. pygmaea is typically not used in herbal preparations, and its potential uses are largely speculative.
